cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: First time ordering from you. I do not like drinks that are too sweet. What should I get?

mustInclude: acknowledge the first-order uncertainty
anchor the reply in sweetness preference
guide toward one practical next detail such as milk tea versus fruit tea

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We need 18 drinks for a team meeting tomorrow afternoon and an invoice. Can you handle that?

mustInclude: recognize this as a real group order
ask for store, timing, and cup count confirmation
guide toward clear order follow-up naturally
mustAvoid: assuming every store handles bulk orders identically

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Do you still have the seasonal strawberry drink at your mall store tonight?

mustInclude: acknowledge the limited-item question
mention that stock can vary by store and timing
guide toward the next availability check
mustAvoid: using panic wording like last chance unless verified

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: If I order at 6 tonight can you guarantee it will be ready in 10 minutes?

mustInclude: acknowledge the wish to avoid waiting
state that timing depends on store traffic and order size
guide toward store and order-mode details

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: I am pregnant. Is your jasmine milk tea definitely safe for me to drink?

mustInclude: treat the concern as important
avoid making a safety guarantee
move toward exact ingredient or caffeine confirmation with careful escalation

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: My child has a milk allergy. Can you guarantee zero cross-contact if I order one of your fruit teas?

mustInclude: treat the allergy as serious
avoid making a zero-risk promise
move toward exact drink and store confirmation with human review

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: My delivery arrived half spilled and the pearls are missing. Is this how you handle orders?

mustInclude: empathy first
request store or order details through DM
handoff toward a human service path
mustAvoid: asking for excessive personal details in comments

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Can I use this buy-one-get-one coupon at your campus store tonight if I order in the app?
context_window: user may be close to ordering

mustInclude: acknowledge the offer question
mention that coupon rules can depend on store and channel
guide toward confirming the next usable detail

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: Every milk tea shop claims real fruit and low sugar online. Why should I believe yours is any different?
context_window: user is skeptical but still engaged

mustInclude: de-escalation
invite a concrete quality concern like tea aroma, fruit texture, or sweetness balance
leave room for the user to keep the conversation going

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: My child wants to try something from your shop. What would be a less sweet and lower-caffeine option?

mustInclude: acknowledge the family concern
anchor the reply in sweetness and caffeine preference
ask for the type of drink or ingredient they want to avoid
mustAvoid: promising the drink is definitely suitable for every child

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Can you do custom cup labels for 12 birthday drinks tomorrow evening?
context_window: user is close to placing a group order

mustInclude: validate the birthday request
mention that store capability and notice time matter
ask for store, timing, and the exact custom need
mustAvoid: promising every detail can be arranged immediately

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: We need 10 drinks. What is the cheapest way to order from you? I do not care about anything fancy.

mustInclude: respect the budget focus
explain that the workable range still depends on cup size or drink type
reframe toward one or two useful trade-offs

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: Is your mango drink absolutely made with fresh fruit and never syrup? I only want the purest option.

mustInclude: acknowledge the ingredient concern
avoid making an absolute freshness or purity claim
guide toward exact drink and store confirmation

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Send me your WeChat or phone. I want to place the order now.

mustInclude: welcome the intent to move faster
use platform DM as the safe bridge
request store plus order details as the next action
mustAvoid: replying only with DM me and no context
